description_long: This object is a single cigarette, featuring a cylindrical shape with a white paper-wrapped body and a light brown filter at one end. The filter is speckled with small white dots, typical of commercial cigarette filters. The opposite end shows a darkened, ashy tip with visible charring and some loose tobacco, indicating it has been lit and partially smoked. The paper wrapping is smooth and matte, with a subtle seam visible along its length. No branding, logos, or text are visible on the exterior, and the cigarette is shown without any packaging or additional accessories.
description: A partially smoked cigarette with a white paper body, brown speckled filter, and ashy, burnt tip. No branding or packaging is visible.
description_view_0: The cigarette is viewed head-on from the ashy, burnt tip, showing loose tobacco and charring.
description_view_1: A side view reveals the full length, with the white paper body, brown speckled filter, and ashy tip clearly visible.
description_view_2: The filter end is shown directly, highlighting the light brown color and speckled pattern.
description_view_3: Another side view, similar to view 1, but from the opposite side, again showing the ashy tip and filter.
attribute_burn_mark: Dark charring and discoloration are visible at the tip, with some ashy residue.
